text:
Stepping into the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The open, almost empty space with its clean lines and bright lights makes me contemplative—wondering what purpose this room serves and what ideas might soon fill the void.

In the second scene, I am invigorated by creativity and innovation. The lively wall of text and technology sparks reflection about the human pursuit of knowledge and progress. Surrounded by talk of research and development, I feel both inspired and hopeful about the future, yet aware of the responsibilities that come with such advancement.
